_comment: Power Automate Flow: Asset Assignment Notification
_import_instructions: 1. Open Power Automate → My flows → Import
2. Or create a new Automated flow → 'When an HTTP request is received'
3. Paste the JSON schema below into the 'Request Body JSON Schema' field
4. Copy the generated HTTP POST URL and paste it into the SPFx web part property pane under 'Asset Assignment Notification'

trigger.type: When an HTTP request is received

actions.subject: IT Asset Assigned: @{triggerBody()?['assetId']} — @{triggerBody()?['model']}
actions.body:
IT Asset Assigned to You

Asset ID@{triggerBody()?['assetId']}
Type@{triggerBody()?['assetType']}
Model@{triggerBody()?['model']}
Serial No.@{triggerBody()?['serialNumber']}
Department@{triggerBody()?['department']}
Location@{triggerBody()?['location']}
Assigned by@{triggerBody()?['triggeredBy']}

Please acknowledge receipt by replying to this email or contacting IT helpdesk.

actions.type: Post message in a chat or channel (Teams)
